name: Gino Vannelli
description: Canadian singer, songwriter and jazz musician
abstract: Gino Vannelli (born June 16, 1952) is a Canadian rock/jazz/fusion/pop vocalist, producer, performer and Hall of Fame songwriter (inducted Oct. 17, 2025).

about_quotes.speaker: Wendell Brunious
about_quotes.evidence: Because Jerome was just — years and years ago he recorded a record, before CDs, an album with Gino Vanelli, where he played soprano.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wendell Brunious interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 16, 2000 [interview 2 of 2]
